name: 格洛克18型 | 粉碎者
descriptionEn: The Glock 18 is a serviceable first-round pistol that works best against unarmored opponents and is capable of firing three-round bursts. The steel slide has been painted using a combination of stenciling and hand-painting using oil paints. The only way to make diamonds is by applying pressure
descriptionZh: 格洛克18型是把耐用的第一回合手枪，非常适合对付那些没有穿护甲的对手，并且可以进行三连发爆炸开火。 钢制滑套使用结合漏字板和配以油画颜料的手绘进行了涂装。 宝剑的锋芒永远需要磨砺
